info.title: Moetruyen Public API
info.description:
Unofficial read-only REST API for [MoeTruyen](https://moetruyen.net/).

Full features will be added in the future (chắc thế)

Github: [TNTKien/moetruyen-public-api](https://github.com/TNTKien/moetruyen-public-api), [dex593/web1 (MoeTruyen)](https://github.com/dex593/web1)

NOTE:
- All API endpoints have a global rate limit of 7 requests per second per IP.
- To avoid future issues, include the Origin: https://suicaodex.com or https://moetruyen.net headers when making API requests.

get.description: Basic service health check for uptime probes and deployment verification.
Returns 1 to 10 random public manga items using the standard manga list item shape.
Returns paginated public manga results with optional search, genre, status, sort, and hasChapters filters.
Returns the public manga detail payload for a manga id.
Returns public chapter metadata for a manga id ordered by latest chapter first.
Returns chapter reader metadata, page URLs, and adjacent chapter links for a public chapter.

403.description: Chapter requires password or is locked

get.description: Returns paginated recent visible root comments across public manga and chapters.
Returns paginated visible manga-level comment threads for a manga id.
Returns paginated visible comment threads for a public chapter id.

403.description: Chapter requires password or is locked

get.description: Returns public genres with visible manga counts.
Returns lightweight public manga search results for a query string.
Returns paginated approved translation teams with optional search and team-specific sort modes.
Returns public-safe metadata for an approved translation team.
Returns paginated recent chapter updates associated with an approved translation team.
Returns paginated public manga results associated with an approved translation team.
Returns approved public-facing members for an approved translation team.
Returns paginated public-visible manga comments and forum replies for a username.
Returns a public-safe user profile summary for a username.
